text_block_list.text:
Another year of training means another year of
summer camp.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This time last year, we were in the midst of the
Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If everything had gone as planned, I wonder if I
would have considered going for the Japan Cup
instead.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, exactly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It wasn't the path for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, if I'm going to win the Sprinters Stakes,
I'll need to focus on improving my speed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Um... King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's me... L-long time no see...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? We see each other just about
everyday at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Yeah, you're right. That... That's true,
but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Um, King!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uhh... Which race are you running in next?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why? I doubt it'll be the same race as yours.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's okay! I just wanted to know! 'Cause,
like, you're so... um...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe! You know you left your stuff out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha... Sorry, El! But right now—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's not good to keep people waiting, you know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, but—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But nothing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...We can chat later, if you'd like. Okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...!
Okay!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: You seem a bit... different today.
You seem a bit... different today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm always improving. Don't expect me to stay the
same forever.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (... You know, King.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I've experienced many different races and
competed against everyone. And so, I was
thinking...)

text_block_list.name: Veteran Reporter
text_block_list.text: Special Week! Who would you say is your rival?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My r-rival?! Hmmm... Let me see.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if "who" is the right question. I can't
even really say whether King or Sei are my rivals...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Because... everyone...
